title: Sweet and Low-Down
writer: Richard English, Edward Haldeman, Benny Goodman
actors: Benny Goodman, Benny Goodman and His Orchestra, Linda Darnell
plot: After their annual free concert at Chicago's Dearborn Settlement, Benny Goodman and his band are packing up to move on to their next engagement at a military camp, when a kid, Tony Birch, steals Goodman's clarinet. Goodman and Pop...
